headline: Lockheed Martin Stock: Is The Iran War Already Priced In?
summary: Lockheed Martin (LMT) stock hit an all-time closing high of $676.70 on March 2, pulled back to around $610, and recovered to trade near $624 by late March. Up roughly 40% over the past year, a move of this scale in a defense major demands a hard question: is it justified by fundamentals, or has the Iran war premium run its course.

headline: Top European Dividend Stocks To Enhance Your Portfolio
summary: As European markets face heightened uncertainty due to geopolitical tensions and soaring energy costs, investors are increasingly seeking stability through dividend stocks. In such volatile times, selecting stocks that offer consistent dividend payouts can provide a measure of reliability and income potential amidst broader market fluctuations.
